scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:api & npm run dev
scripts.dev:api:local: APP_ENV=local LOCAL_AUTH_BYPASS=true DEV_CLERK_USER_ID=clerk_test_user DEV_STORE_SLUG=test-store DATABASE_URL=postgresql://lojaveiculosv2:lojaveiculosv2_dev@localhost:54321/lojaveiculosv2 AUDIT_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://lojaveiculosv2_audit:lojaveiculosv2_audit_dev@localhost:54322/lojaveiculosv2_audit REPASSES_CRM_API_URL=http://localhost:3001/api/v1 npm run dev:api
scripts.dev:all:local: npm run dev:api:local & npm run dev
scripts.dev:local: npm run db:up && npm run db:push:local && npm run db:seed:local && npm run dev:all:local
scripts.db:logs: COMPOSE_DISABLE_ENV_FILE=1 docker compose logs -f lojaveiculosv2-postgres lojaveiculosv2-audit-postgres
scripts.db:push: npm run db:push --workspace @lojaveiculosv2/db && npm run db:push --workspace @lojaveiculosv2/audit-db
scripts.db:push:local: DATABASE_URL=postgresql://lojaveiculosv2:lojaveiculosv2_dev@localhost:54321/lojaveiculosv2 AUDIT_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://lojaveiculosv2_audit:lojaveiculosv2_audit_dev@localhost:54322/lojaveiculosv2_audit npm run db:push:force --workspace @lojaveiculosv2/db && AUDIT_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://lojaveiculosv2_audit:lojaveiculosv2_audit_dev@localhost:54322/lojaveiculosv2_audit npm run db:push:force --workspace @lojaveiculosv2/audit-db
scripts.db:seed:local: COMPOSE_DISABLE_ENV_FILE=1 docker compose exec -T lojaveiculosv2-postgres psql -U lojaveiculosv2 -d lojaveiculosv2 -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f /seed/product-test-user.sql
scripts.db:up: COMPOSE_DISABLE_ENV_FILE=1 docker compose up -d --wait lojaveiculosv2-postgres lojaveiculosv2-audit-postgres
scripts.validate: npm run check:lines && npm run check:boundaries && npm run check:env && npm run check:db && npm run check:frontend && npm run check:services && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
